headline: Google's Nationwide Expansion Into Home Listings Shakes Real Estate Incumbents
summary: On Thursday, Google parent company Alphabet officially announced the nationwide rollout of its Enhanced Local Services Ads for Home Listings across all 50 U.S. states.

raw.headline: Google's Nationwide Expansion Into Home Listings Shakes Real Estate Incumbents
raw.summary: On Thursday, Google parent company Alphabet officially announced the nationwide rollout of its Enhanced Local Services Ads for Home Listings across all 50 U.S. states.

headline: World Cup Economics: How Much Boost Could The US Get?
summary: Bank of America says the 2026 World Cup could add 0.6% to U.S. GDP this year — and the hiring boost already showed up in May jobs.

raw.headline: World Cup Economics: How Much Boost Could The US Get?
